name: Twitch EPG
description: One-field Twitch plugin for Dispatcharr: enter Twitch logins only. It auto-updates streamlink-ttvlol daily, creates low-latency Twitch streams, and keeps a twitch2tuner-style XMLTV guide fresh.
author: Dispatcharr Twitch EPG

actions.label: Sync Twitch lineup
actions.description: One-click sync: updates ttv.lol if needed, creates/updates channels and streams, writes the EPG, and keeps the automatic daily updater enabled.

actions.label: Refresh guide now
actions.description: Refreshes live/offline status, current game, stream title, icons, XMLTV and Dispatcharr EPG rows.

actions.label: Repair ttv.lol now
actions.description: Manually downloads the latest streamlink-ttvlol twitch.py. Normally this happens automatically once per day.

actions.label: Uninstall managed objects
actions.description: Removes the EPG source, StreamProfile, and all Channels created by this plugin. Does not delete the plugin itself.

confirm.title: Remove managed objects?
confirm.message: This deletes the Twitch StreamProfile, EPG source, and every Channel/Stream this plugin created. The plugin and its settings stay in place.
